name: Candy Christmas
short_description: A casual match-3 game with a Christmas theme and lofi music. Match 3 identical candies, make combos, and reach the highest score before time runs out. Challenge yourself with simple yet engaging mechanics. Perfect for relaxing during the holidays. Enjoy the Christmas fun!
detailed_description:
Try our casual and relaxing game, perfect for lovers of Christmas themes and lofi music. With simple yet challenging mechanics, your goal is to achieve the highest score and progress through the higher levels before time runs out.

The main mechanic involves matching groups of 3 identical candies. To move the pieces, simply click on the desired candy with the mouse and then select an adjacent piece (above, below, to the left, or to the right) to swap positions. This way, you can align 3 identical candies horizontally or vertically, remembering that each piece can only be moved once.

To boost your score, take advantage of combos! If you can form more than one combination within 5 seconds after the previous one, you will earn extra points. However, be careful! If you block more than half of the board or let the time run out, it's game over. A valuable tip: if you run out of possible moves, it is recommended to restart a new game to increase your chances of winning.
